subject: Update CPS DB based on CM VES message for SON
commit_message:
Update CPS DB based on CM VES message for SON

Added Consumer Configuration for CM VES Event and Mapper to convert VES to AVC Event

Issue-ID: CPS-1407
Change-Id: If3dfdfc39e114cd1ba78de34d15347aeaa9f288b
Signed-off-by: vvarvate <vishal-vasantrao.varvate@capgemini.com>
